# ipmi_sensors (Data Source)

All Sensor Data Records (SDR) from `ipmitool sdr list` — temperatures, fan RPMs, voltages, currents, discrete state sensors.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `interface` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `port` (Number)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `sensors` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensors))

<a id="nestedatt--sensors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensors`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `reading` (String) Numeric value, or raw hex for discrete sensors.
- `status` (String) ok, nc, cr, nr, ns.
- `unit` (String) Empty for discrete sensors.
